name: Sarah Chen
bio: Met in freshman year at university. We bonded over late-night study sessions and terrible cafeteria food. Now she's a brilliant UX designer in Seattle.

name: Marcus Johnson
bio: My former manager who taught me everything about product thinking. We grab coffee every few weeks to talk strategy and career. He's a VP at a fintech startup now.

name: Aisha Patel
bio: Known each other since elementary school. We grew up in the same neighborhood and have been through everything together — weddings, losses, big moves.

name: Tom Baker
bio: Met on a group hiking trip in Colorado. We share a passion for photography and adventure. He travels the world shooting landscapes for a living.

name: Olivia Martinez
bio: Former coworker who became a real friend. We collaborated on a product launch that almost broke us both, and came out laughing on the other side.

name: Ryan O'Brien
bio: My college roommate for three years. We drove cross-country after graduation and I still owe him $40 from that road trip. He's a high school teacher now in Boston.

name: Lisa Nakamura
bio: A close family friend who's been like an aunt to me growing up. She makes the best sushi and always knows what to say when things get hard.

name: James Wright
bio: Gym buddy turned genuine friend. We push each other hard during workouts and talk about everything from philosophy to fantasy football during cool-downs.
